name: ai-health-public-chatbot
description: AI health chatbot monorepo with frontend and backend
author: meghavardhan25

scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
